items.title: JPM's Feroli Sees 2 Rate Cuts, Solid 3Q Productivity
items.description: Mike Feroli, JPMorgan chief U.S. economist, says slower job growth alongside steady GDP growth points to strong productivity gains. He notes signs of improvement in the second quarter and expects solid growth in the third. Feroli speaks with Romaine Bostick and Matt Miller on "The Close."

items.title: Top Stock Picks for Week of September 22, 2025
items.description: A Specialty Finance Platform with a Healthy History of Earnings Beats and a Global Bank with Strong Shareholder Returns.

items.title: JPMorgan’s Phil Sieg to Retire After Leading Brokerage Unit Since 2021
items.description: The longtime wealth management executive oversaw J.P. Morgan Advisors, the bank’s brokerage unit serving wealthy investors.

items.title: COF Reaches Settlement With Influencers Over Affiliate Marketing Clash
items.description: Capital One settles with influencers over claims its Shopping extension diverted affiliate commissions, without admitting wrongdoing.

items.title: Brokers Suggest Investing in JPMorgan Chase & Co. (JPM): Read This Before Placing a Bet
items.description: Based on the average brokerage recommendation (ABR), JPMorgan Chase & Co. (JPM) should be added to one's portfolio. Wall Street analysts' overly optimistic recommendations cast doubt on the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric. So, is the stock worth buying?
